pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes the spec document to this path.
setup_task.sh instructs the agent to save the plan to this path, and export_result.sh checks for it here.
export_result.sh explicitly writes the JSON result payload to this path.
setup_task.sh injects these exact required parameter values into the parachute_spec.txt instructions, and verifier.py checks for these exact values.
setup_task.sh injects this exact latitude into the parachute_spec.txt instructions, and verifier.py explicitly scores against this latitude.
setup_task.sh injects this exact longitude into the parachute_spec.txt instructions, and verifier.py explicitly scores against this longitude.
setup_task.sh injects this exact altitude requirement into the parachute_spec.txt instructions, and verifier.py explicitly scores against 80m for both takeoff and waypoint.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that all task data is entirely synthetically generated via setup_task.sh, which creates a specification document requiring 4 exact parameters (CHUTE_ENABLED=1, CHUTE_TYPE=10, SERVO9_FUNCTION=27, CHUTE_ALT_MIN=25) and a mission plan at dropping zone (-35.3615, 149.1650) with an altitude of 80m. These values explicitly match the metadata claims and the evaluation script logic.
